introduction.title: About Photasa
introduction.content: Photasa is a modern, privacy-friendly photo management tool inspired by Picasa. Organize, browse, and enjoy your photos and videos with powerful local features and a beautiful interface—no cloud required.
introduction.summary: Photasa helps you rediscover and manage your memories with ease.

resources.title: Resources
resources.content: Explore additional resources and documentation for Photasa.

about.markdown:
# About Photasa

Photasa is a modern, privacy-friendly local photo management tool inspired by the classic Picasa.
It supports efficient browsing, organizing, and managing your photos and videos, with a beautiful interface and powerful local features—no cloud required.

## Key Features

- Smart local import and management of photos and videos
- Fast thumbnail generation and preview
- Multi-language interface and theme switching
- Batch operations and efficient search
- Data privacy and security protection

Press `Esc` to exit
